introSection: Wild Train was a steel roller coaster located at Parc Saint Paul in Saint-Paul, Hauts-de-France, France. It opened in 2000, and during 2018 was standing but not operating. Wild Train was removed after the 2024 season.
fullText: Wild Train was a steel roller coaster located at Parc Saint Paul in Saint-Paul, Hauts-de-France, France. It opened in 2000, and during 2018 was standing but not operating. Wild Train was removed after the 2024 season.
